name: 13oz Stoneware FAVORITE TEACHER Camper Mug - Room Essentials™
description:
Give your child's favorite teacher a sweet and functional gift with this 13-Ounce Stoneware Favorite Teacher Camper Mug from Room Essentials™. Made from stoneware, this camper mug is designed in a cream hue with a black rim and black "Favorite Teacher" text. Featuring a curved side handle for easy holding, the mug is dishwasher safe for convenient cleaning.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
